title: Champion Breweries; Appointment of New MD
description: Dr. Inalegwu Adoga has been appointed as the Managing Director/CEO of Champion Breweries Plc, Uyo, effective December 1, 2023. He joined in July 2019 as Production Manager, swiftly ascending to Genera
html:
Dr. Inalegwu Adoga has been appointed as the Managing Director/CEO of Champion Breweries Plc, Uyo, effective December 1, 2023.

He joined in July 2019 as Production Manager, swiftly ascending to General Manager by September 2021.

In the last four years, his leadership has transformed the business, increasing efficiency, revenue, profitability, and market share.

With a background in Coca Cola Hellenic and Heineken, Dr. Adoga, a certified ‘Master Brewer,’ holds a Master’s in Brewing Operations and a Ph.D. in Business Administration (Honoris Causa).
